import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn parse_tokens(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    mut skipping = true
    while skipping
      if i >= n
        skipping = false
      else
        match string.byte_at(s, i)
        when Some(b)
          if is_ws(b)
            i = i + 1
          else
            skipping = false
          end
        when None
          skipping = false
        end
      end
    end
    if i < n
      let start = i
      mut scanning = true
      while scanning
        if i >= n
          scanning = false
        else
          match string.byte_at(s, i)
          when Some(b)
            if is_ws(b)
              scanning = false
            else
              i = i + 1
            end
          when None
            scanning = false
          end
        end
      end
      let tok = string.substring(s, start, i)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      when None
        result = result
      end
    end
  end
  result
end

fn bsearch(_ xs: List<Int>, _ t: Int) -> Option<Int>
  mut lo = 0
  mut hi = xs.len()
  mut found: Option<Int> = None
  mut searching = true
  while searching
    if lo >= hi
      searching = false
    else
      let mid = (lo + hi) / 2
      match xs.get(mid)
      when Some(v)
        if v == t
          found = Some(mid)
          searching = false
        else if v < t
          lo = mid + 1
        else
          hi = mid
        end
      when None
        searching = false
      end
    end
  end
  found
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let tokens = parse_tokens(line1)

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let target = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(v)
  v
when None
  0
end

match bsearch(tokens, target)
when Some(i)
  println("index=#{i}")
when None
  println("not_found")
end
